task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing a successful 'mkdir' command for '/home/ga/Desktop/LabDownloads/' or a file manager window showing the 'LabDownloads' folder located on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Set the default download location to the newly created directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tor Browser settings (about:preferences), under the 'Files and Applications' or 'Downloads' section, the 'Save files to' path is explicitly set to '/home/ga/Desktop/LabDownloads'.

task_completion.description: Configure the browser to always ask where to save files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tor Browser settings (about:preferences), the radio button for 'Always ask you where to save files' is selected.

task_completion.description: Set the homepage and new windows to https://ssd.eff.org/
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tor Browser Home settings (about:preferences#home), the 'Homepage and new windows' option is set to 'Custom URLs...' and the text input box contains exactly 'https://ssd.eff.org/'.

task_completion.description: Remove the 'New Identity' button from the toolbar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tor Browser main window or 'Customize Toolbar' screen, the 'New Identity' button (typically a broom icon) is absent from the top toolbar.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Zoom Controls' and 'Print' buttons to the toolbar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tor Browser main window or 'Customize Toolbar' screen, the 'Zoom Controls' (minus, percentage, and plus icons) and 'Print' (printer icon) buttons are visible on the top toolbar.

task_completion.description: Leave the Tor Browser running once configuration is complete.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshot in the trajectory shows the Tor Browser application open and active on the screen.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Tor Browser GUI to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Tor Browser settings pages (about:preferences) and customization menus being used, rather than a text editor modifying configuration files like prefs.js.

integrity.description: The agent did not type the expected answers into a text editor to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs and file paths must be visible within the actual Tor Browser UI elements (text boxes, settings menus), not in a standalone text document.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created the directory rather than just typing the path into the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands or file manager interactions confirming the directory was created on the OS, not just typed into the browser's download path field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected download directory is exactly '/home/ga/Desktop/LabDownloads'. The target homepage URL is exactly 'https://ssd.eff.org/'.
